decisions.decision: Settings client-side only, baked into draft_state on startDraft
decisions.rationale: Avoids updateSettings RPC + in-memory Map; no settings-lost-on-refresh bug
svelte-realtime writes this file on scan, Vite detected it as a change causing infinite hot-reload loop
